# AcornsGuide

> AcornsGuide is an independent Acorns investing review and comparison site for US investors. Reviews, fee breakdowns, competitor comparisons, and sign-up guides.

## Affiliate Disclosure

AcornsGuide earns commissions when users sign up through our links. All links are clearly disclosed. Investing involves risk. Not financial advice.
